name: Apple Mail MCP
description: Natural language interface for Apple Mail with 27 tools — email search, composition, bulk operations, smart inbox analytics, folder management, and security-hardened destructive operations. Includes email-management and inbox-triage skills plus Interactive UI Dashboard.

user_preferences.title: Email Preferences
user_preferences.description: Your personal email preferences that will be provided to the AI assistant when using email tools (e.g., 'Default to BCG account, show max 50 emails, prefer Archive folder')

default_account.title: Default Mail Account
default_account.description: When set, email tools default to this account instead of scanning all configured Mail accounts. Use the exact account name as it appears in Apple Mail (e.g. 'Gmail', 'Work', 'iCloud'). Leave blank to query all accounts by default.

tools.name: get_inbox_overview
tools.description: Dashboard overview across all accounts: unread counts, mailbox structure with unread indicators, recent-email preview, and AI-driven action suggestions.

tools.name: list_inbox_emails
tools.description: List inbox emails across all accounts or a single account. Defaults to 50 most-recent. Async parallel per-account dispatch; returns {emails, errors} JSON.

tools.name: get_mailbox_unread_counts
tools.description: Per-mailbox or per-account unread counts. Pass summary_only=True for the fast per-account roll-up.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all Mail accounts configured in Apple Mail.

tools.name: list_account_addresses
tools.description: List the sender email addresses (aliases) configured for a given Mail account.

tools.name: list_mailboxes
tools.description: List mailboxes (folders) for one account or all accounts, with optional message counts.

tools.name: move_email
tools.description: Move emails between mailboxes by subject/sender/date filters. Supports nested paths (e.g. 'Projects/Alpha'). Default max 50 moves; runs in dry_run mode unless explicitly disabled.

tools.name: reply_to_email
tools.description: Reply to emails matching a subject keyword. Send or save as draft, optional reply-all, supports CC/BCC.

tools.name: compose_email
tools.description: Compose and send a new email from a specific account (or DEFAULT_MAIL_ACCOUNT). Supports TO/CC/BCC, optional HTML body via the rich-draft path.

tools.name: forward_email
tools.description: Forward emails matching a subject keyword to specified recipients. Optional prepended message, CC/BCC.

tools.name: create_rich_email_draft
tools.description: Build a rich HTML multipart .eml draft, open it in Mail, and optionally save into Drafts. Use this instead of injecting raw HTML into AppleScript content.

tools.name: manage_drafts
tools.description: Complete draft lifecycle: list, create, send, delete. Send action is blocked in --read-only mode.

tools.name: list_email_attachments
tools.description: List attachments for inbox emails. Capped at max_results (default 50) for fast responses on large inboxes.

tools.name: save_email_attachment
tools.description: Save a specific attachment to disk. Validates target path — blocks writes to sensitive directories.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Unified email search across 16 filter parameters: subject, body, sender, date range, attachments, flagged, newsletter detection, threads. Defaults to last 48 hours and the default account (DEFAULT_MAIL_ACCOUNT). Pass recent_days=0 for full-inbox sweeps, all_accounts=True to override default account.

tools.name: get_email_by_id
tools.description: Fetch one exact email by the Apple Mail message id returned from search results. Use after search_emails when you need full body or stable metadata without another broad subject search.

tools.name: get_email_thread
tools.description: Return the full conversation thread for an email, grouped by subject across Inbox + Sent.

tools.name: update_email_status
tools.description: Batch mark read/unread, flag/unflag. Requires at least one filter or explicit apply_to_all. Default max 10 per call.

tools.name: manage_trash
tools.description: Email deletion lifecycle: move_to_trash, delete_permanent, empty_trash. Requires filters for safety. empty_trash requires confirm_empty=True. Default max 5 per call.

tools.name: create_mailbox
tools.description: Create a new mailbox (folder) in an account. Supports nested paths and auto-creates parents.

tools.name: synchronize_account
tools.description: Trigger Mail.app to fetch new messages for a single account or all accounts. Useful before time-sensitive searches.

tools.name: get_awaiting_reply
tools.description: Sent emails that haven't received a reply. Cross-references Sent vs Inbox over a configurable window (default 7 days).

tools.name: get_needs_response
tools.description: Unread emails that likely need a response. Filters out newsletters/automated senders, assigns priority hints.

tools.name: get_top_senders
tools.description: Rank senders by frequency over a date window. Optional grouping by domain. Top-N sort happens Python-side for fast responses.

tools.name: get_statistics
tools.description: Email analytics: account overview, sender stats, or mailbox breakdown. Scans the 20 largest mailboxes, up to 500 messages each.

tools.name: export_emails
tools.description: Export emails to txt or html. Single email by subject, or entire mailbox capped at max_emails (default 1000).

tools.name: inbox_dashboard
tools.description: Interactive UI dashboard for MCP Apps-compatible clients (requires mcp-ui-server). Account cards, recent emails, and search.
